title: Delete uploads from main feed with author-only gating and draft cleanup

requirements.summary: Show a delete action in the main feed for backend uploads authored by the currently authenticated user (including the post titled "test"), and hide it when signed out.
acceptanceCriteria: When signed in, backend items in the main feed that are authored by the signed-in principal display a visible delete option (e.g., in a post menu)
The backend-upload post titled "test" in the main feed displays the delete option for its author
When not signed in, no delete option is shown in the main feed for backend uploads

file_operations.description: Ensure the delete action is only rendered for backend feed cards when the user is authenticated and the card's author principal matches the signed-in principal; keep the UI affordance as the existing shadcn-ui DropdownMenu + AlertDialog pattern (verify the component's usage instructions before implementing).

Keep backend feed items mapped from backend posts with their `author` preserved so AudioCard can accurately gate the delete option by signed-in principal (no UI changes beyond supporting delete gating).

requirements.summary: Support deletion flows in the feed UI for both published backend uploads and local draft uploads, including removing drafts from localStorage and updating the feed view accordingly.
acceptanceCriteria: Deleting a backend upload removes it from the feed and from subsequent calls that load the user’s backend content (e.g., the item no longer appears after refresh)
Deleting a backend upload also deletes the underlying stored audio data so it is no longer retrievable via backend blob access for that post
Deleting a draft upload removes it from the feed and from localStorage so it does not reappear after refresh

file_operations.description: Add a draft deletion utility (e.g., remove-by-id) that permanently removes a draft item from localStorage, and provide a lightweight change-notification mechanism so the feed can refresh draft items after deletion.

Refactor draft loading to be reactive (subscribe to the draft change-notification and refresh draft items in component state) so deleting a draft removes it from the feed immediately and it does not reappear after refresh.

Wire the delete action to handle two cases: (1) backend items call the existing `useRemoveAudioPost` mutation; (2) draft items call the new local draft removal utility; reuse the existing shadcn-ui AlertDialog confirmation UI (verify the component's usage instructions before implementing).

requirements.summary: Enforce author-only deletion behavior in the main feed UI and surface a clear English error message if a non-author attempts deletion.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend rejects delete attempts from non-authors with an authorization error
Frontend does not show a delete option on published uploads unless the signed-in user is the author
If a non-author still attempts deletion (e.g., via manual calls), the UI shows an English error message indicating the user can only delete their own posts

file_operations.description: Ensure the delete mutation (`useRemoveAudioPost`) reliably maps backend authorization failures into a user-visible English error message indicating the user can only delete their own posts (keep behavior tightly scoped to delete).

Avoid swallowing delete errors in a way that prevents the existing toast-based messaging; ensure unauthorized deletion attempts still surface the English error to the user while keeping delete UI gated by author check (shadcn-ui menu/dialog already in use; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing).
